title: arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. mendocinoensis
intro: Arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. mendocinoensis, also known as Mendocino manzanita, is a shrub or small tree that is native to California and belongs to the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. mendocinoensis can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
